title: Festive Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with festive seasonings, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is a great way to get in some veggies and can be customized to your taste.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes until they start to soften.
Add the sliced kale and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the veggies are tender.
Stir in the festive seasoning blend and cook for 1 minute.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
